gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps slightly forward, smiles warmly, and gestures with open arms toward the colorful objects on the screen
a person leans slightly forward, tilts their head, and raises one hand as if inquiring about removing objects from the group
a tutor stands tall, gently waves both hands toward the objects, and encourages the class to count together with enthusiasm
a person moves their hands apart, mimicking the action of taking away two objects while looking engagingly at the learners
a tutor points with one hand to the two groups of objects, eyes sparkling, while inviting the class to notice their amounts
a person steps closer to the learner, gestures between the two groups with both hands, and encourages students to find the difference
a tutor brings both hands together enthusiastically, nodding while summarizing what the class learned about taking away objects
a person claps their hands together lightly, beams with pride, and encourages everyone for doing a great job exploring subtraction
